testcase.name: test_driver_performance_still_200

failure.message: AssertionError: missing key earnings_today in performance response assert 'earnings_today' in {'acceptance_rate': 100.0, 'completion_rate': 98.0, 'deliveries': {'today': 9, 'total': 18, 'week': 18}, 'earnings': {'today': 108.0, 'total': 1123.9, 'week': 1123.9}, ...}

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_live_tracking.py:267: in test_driver_performance_still_200 assert key in body, f"missing key {key} in performance response" E AssertionError: missing key earnings_today in performance response E assert 'earnings_today' in {'acceptance_rate': 100.0, 'completion_rate': 98.0, 'deliveries': {'today': 9, 'total': 18, 'week': 18}, 'earnings': {'today': 108.0, 'total': 1123.9, 'week': 1123.9}, ...}
